channel.title: Struggling with working remote for the first time? This can help
channel.description:
Last week, our CEO & Co-founder @Pablo gave an online session to help those teams who are **struggling with working remote for the first time** during this COVID-19 outbreak. He talked about our remote work-dynamic and shared best practices on being a more productive remote team.
If you are interested in learning more, [here are the slides of the presentation](https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/1kokVnqIkh5B7O-_5CwDLx1NSOR3HUqdywVAm753h8J4/edit#slide=id.gc6f73a04f_0_0). You can also watch the session in Spanish [here](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1Xo8l5hlRJW1W1Q06zQksaZrMed6FwibN/view).
Additional guides:
- [Internal meetings best practices](https://www.notion.so/frontity/Internal-meetings-best-practices-f1f4496ffa184add923d4a303b42862c) - [Slack etiquette & tips](https://www.notion.so/frontity/Slack-Etiquette-Tips-b0bccb3e97e340f8b3ab830c42637a3b)
Please feel free to **share this with teams who need the support.**
Don’t hesitate to reach out with any ask questions. We'll do our best to help in any way we can.

item.title: Struggling with working remote for the first time? This can help
item.dc:creator: Reyes
item.description:
Here’s another podcast (in Spanish) in which @luisherranz and @Pablo talk about our experience as a remote team:

Medium – 27 Mar 20

PodKast — Ep.94 — La experiencia de Frontity convirtiéndose en una empresa...

Somos un fondo de Venture Capital. Si tienes un proyecto interesante que encaja con nuestros criterios de inversión y quieres que le echemos un vistazo, por favorrellena este formulario. Regresamos…

Reading time: 1 min read

Read full topic
item.source: Struggling with working remote for the first time? This can help

item.title: Struggling with working remote for the first time? This can help
item.dc:creator: Pablo
item.description:
Thanks for sharing this with the Community @Reyes

Reyes:

Additional guides:

  • Internal meetings best practices
  • Slack etiquette & tips

I think these two guides can be useful for many teams, and would love to improve them if we receive feedback

Read full topic
item.source: Struggling with working remote for the first time? This can help

item.title: Struggling with working remote for the first time? This can help
item.dc:creator: Reyes
item.description:
Last week, our CEO & Co-founder @Pablo gave an online session to help those teams who are struggling with working remote for the first time during this COVID-19 outbreak. He talked about our remote work-dynamic and shared best practices on being a more productive remote team.

If you are interested in learning more, here are the slides of the presentation. You can also watch the session in Spanish here.

Additional guides:

  • Internal meetings best practices
  • Slack etiquette & tips

Please feel free to share this with teams who need the support.

Don’t hesitate to reach out with any ask questions. We’ll do our best to help in any way we can.

Read full topic
item.source: Struggling with working remote for the first time? This can help
